'''Soth Petikkin''' was a native of [[Tefau]]. A [[blue]]-skinned [[Tefaun]], Petikkin served as a persuasive [[Recruitment Agent|recruiter]]<ref name="CCG" /> for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|22|Petikkin, Soth}}</ref> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He used his contacts in<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]<ref name="Jabba CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|130|Jabba the Hutt (Jabba Desilijic Tiure)}}</ref> [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|desert palace]]<ref name="CCG" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Jabba CSWE" /> to find support for the Alliance. Soth Petikkin possessed limited [[Precognition/Legends|precognition]], and also had a level of [[Force-attunement|attunement]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Soth Petikkin's origins date back to the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]{{'s}} production stages. A number of [[Alien/Legends|alien]] maquettes were designed for possible inclusion in scenes taking place in Jabba's Palace. Among the concepts scrapped before the film's release was a [[Robe/Legends|robed]] biped known as "Alien 25," who might have been a candidate for one of Jabba's [[Aide/Legends|aides]].<ref name="SWC 242">''[[Star Wars Chronicles]]''</ref> In [[1998]], Soth Petikkin was created for a card in the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]]'s [[Special Edition Limited]] set, which showed a manipulated image of the maquette.<ref name="CCG" />
